subcodes.first_line: O enchanted seeker of truth! Thy letter dated 1921 hath been received. A soul that seeketh after truth [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای مفتون حقیقت نامه شما تاریخ 1921 رسید انسانی که طالب حقیقت است
subcodes.subjects: @lists; enumerations of Baha'i principles, @oneness; unity of religion, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion, @harmony of science and religion, @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @universal peace; world unity
